news.summary: A company based in Minnetonka, Minnesota, Fireaway Inc., disclosed on May 15, 2025, the introduction of UltraSense™ sensors. Fireaway Inc. is recognized worldwide as a top provider of fire suppression solutions.

The event aims to demonstrate the efficiency and innovation of Bradford White's products, with a focus on the compact design of the Brute FT® Floor Boilers. news.summary: In BAY SHORE, N.Y., Air Industries Group, a prominent manufacturer of precision components and assemblies for aerospace and defense prime contractors, has disclosed its Financial Results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. During this period, the company recorded a decrease in net sales compared to the previous year, while experiencing an increase in gross profit. The operational and net outcomes were influenced by specific timings and cost-related factors. The specifics of the net sales figures are as follows: for the three months ending March 31, 2025, Air Industries reported a decline in net sales in comparison to the same period in 2024.
news.headline: Air Industries Group reports financial results for Q1 2025: lower net sales compared to 2024, but increased gross profit.

news.summary: The QKS group's SPARK Matrix™ has named Quadient as a 2025 technology leader in the Accounts Receivable Applications category. Quadient has received strong ratings for its technology excellence and customer impact. The analysis includes global market dynamics, major trends, and competitive positioning. Quadient's AR application offers features like invoice processing with real-time analytics, predictive insights for debt management, optimized dispute handling, and advanced cash flow optimization. They also utilize AI and ML algorithms for remittance-to-invoice matching and support emerging payment technologies. This recognition highlights Quadient's innovative approach in the Accounts Receivable Applications market. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Quadient named leader in Accounts Receivable Apps by QKS Group for 2025, lauded for tech excellence and customer impact.

news.summary: QKS Group has recognized HPS as a technology leader in its SPARK Matrix™ for Card Management Systems, 2024. HPS's PowerCARD platform facilitates seamless issuance and management of credit, debit, and prepaid cards via various channels. The platform's capabilities include multi-currency, multi-product, and multi-institution support, enhancing global card portfolio management. It features rule-based engines, back-office support, and integrated fraud and risk management for operational efficiency and regulatory compliance. CMS software solutions like PowerCARD manage payment card lifecycles, billing, multiple payment types, account management, and integrations with ATM and POS systems. These platforms also handle card transaction processing, API integrations, clearing, settlement operations, credit scoring, dispute resolution, microfinance services, merchant servicing, corporate card issuance, and expense management. Sriram S R, Senior Analyst at QKS Group, commended HPS for providing financial institutions with a comprehensive platform for transforming card management operations.
news.headline: HPS named technology leader in QKS Group’s SPARK Matrix: Card Management Systems, 2024 for superior PowerCARD platform managing global card portfolios with seamless issuance and management of credit, debit, and prepaid cards across multiple channels.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in Cincinnati. The company, known for its focus on developing zero-emission commercial vehicles, disclosed key figures for the quarter ending March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) reports Q1 2025 results, focused on zero-emission commercial vehicles.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Echo has received the esteemed Mom’s Choice Award® in the Health & Wellness category for its Echo Flask, a groundbreaking product. The award highlights the Echo Flask's dedication to improving family health with innovative hydrogen water technology. This smart hydrogen water bottle offers the highest concentration of hydrogen water available. Featuring advanced proton-exchange membrane technology, the Echo Flask stands out for its excellence in enhancing wellness.
news.headline: Echo Flask wins Mom’s Choice Award for Health & Wellness innovation in hydrogen water technology, high in antioxidant properties.

news.summary: A report on the "Global Nuclear Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) Market 2025-2045" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) is seen as a highly promising sector in the nuclear energy industry. SMRs feature innovative reactor designs with electrical outputs usually below 300 MWe. This market is on the rise due to the demand for low-carbon energy options offering increased flexibility and cost savings.
news.headline: Global SMR market to transform energy landscape by 2045 with electrical outputs typically below 300 MWe - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: As of May 15, 2025, a statement was released urging all current and former Fellows of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) to vote against the proposed changes and amendments to the AAOS Bylaws. The individual issuing the statement is a past Chair of the Board of Specialties and a former member of the AAOS Board. The specific details of the proposed changes were not disclosed, but members are being encouraged to vote against them. It is crucial for active and emeritus Fellows of AAOS to participate in the voting process to have their say on the potential alterations.
news.headline: Dr. Kevin Plancher urges AAOS Fellows to vote NO on proposed bylaws changes to protect their voices.

news.summary: A new documentary titled "Shelter Me: The Cancer Pioneers" has been released by an Emmy Award-winning series, highlighting the crucial contribution of dogs in advancing human cancer treatments. Premiering on May 15, 2025, the documentary showcases this important role and is available for free streaming on the PBS app and PBS platform. Viewers can access this thought-provoking content, shedding light on the significant impact dogs have on cancer research and treatment.
news.headline: Emmy-winning series "Shelter Me: The Cancer Pioneers" premieres on PBS, showcasing dogs' role in cancer treatments.

news.summary: Today in Portland, Oregon, the Wy'East Mountain Academy introduced North America's largest landing bag training system in partnership with Project Gold, the U.S. national team's youth development initiative. This groundbreaking system aims to enhance training for young athletes and is a joint effort with High Cascade Snowboard Camp and Windells Freeski Camp. The landing bag training system is set to revolutionize athlete development with its advanced technology and will benefit aspiring athletes in North America. The debut of this system marks a significant milestone in the sports industry, offering promising opportunities for youth athletes to hone their skills.
news.headline: Shaun White launches U.S. Olympic talent search with North America's largest landing bag training system at Mount Hood.

The announcement came on May 15, 2025, with Rebekah Lusk being included in The Daily Record's prestigious 2025 Power List: Business Law edition. This recognition highlights the expertise and influence of Attorney Lusk in the legal field.
news.headline: Rebekah Lusk named to The Daily Record's 2025 Power List for Business Law in Maryland, highlighting her as one of the most influential professionals.

news.summary: Yardstick Insights, Inc. (Yardstick) has introduced a cutting-edge data and insights platform in New York on May 15, 2025. This platform enables users to convert publicly accessible data into useful reports through AI technology. This innovative tool is designed to assist businesses in gaining improved comprehension of market trends and making informed decisions.
news.headline: Yardstick Insights launches new platform helping businesses utilize AI to analyze and act on data.

news.summary: In Toronto, Americas Gold and Silver Corporation (TSX: USA) (NYSE American: USAS) disclosed positive findings from recent metallurgical tests conducted at its Galena Complex in Idaho. The results revealed significant recoveries of antimony, as well as robust retrieval rates for silver and copper from the ore under processing. Paul Andre Huet, Chairman and CEO of the Company, expressed enthusiasm about the results, stating, “I am thrilled by the outcomes of our recent test work.”
news.headline: Metallurgical test at Galena Complex shows over 90% antimony recovery, supporting potential near-term production. CEO pleased with results. TSX: USA, NYSE: USAS.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Lithium Americas Corp. (TSX: LAC) (NYSE: LAC) revealed the submission of its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2025 (“Q1 2025”). The report encompasses the Company’s consolidated interim financial statements. The Company also gave an overview of its Thacker Pass lithium project situated in Humboldt County, Nevada. Jonathan Evans, the President and Chief Executive Officer, provided the updates.
news.headline: Lithium Americas reports Q1 2025 results, filed 10-Q report with financials, update on Thacker Pass project in Nevada.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on May 15, 2025, Carnegie Mellon University (CMU), Arm, and SoftBank Group Corp. (SBG) revealed a joint effort where Arm and SBG will provide USD 15.5 million to support CMU's collaboration with Keio University. The partnership aims to boost international initiatives and innovation projects.
news.headline: Arm and SoftBank Group contribute $15.5 million to advance AI through Carnegie Mellon University's partnership with Keio University.

news.summary: In Windhoek, Namibia, Rhino Resources (OTC: RHNO) and Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) have successfully completed the delivery of two exploration wells on Block 2914 under Petroleum Exploration License (PEL) 85 offshore Namibia. Halliburton's comprehensive services and collaborative strategies played a crucial role in Rhino's achievement as the operator of the block. These milestone exploration wells mark the initial completions facilitated solely by local infrastructure through Halliburton's recently set up operational hubs in Wal.
news.headline: Rhino Resources and Halliburton deliver first 2 exploration wells on Block 2914 in Namibia; Halliburton's integrated services key to Rhino's success as block's operator.

news.summary: Amidst rising mental health demands in dioceses throughout the United States, Bishop Emeritus Paul S. Loverde of the Diocese of Arlington in Virginia has been a prominent figure. Initially appointed as the third bishop of the diocese by St. John Paul II, he has been instrumental in addressing this crucial issue. With the prevalence of mental health challenges in various regions across the country, including Sterling, Virginia, the need for effective support and resources is evident. As communities grapple with these issues, individuals like Bishop Loverde play a vital role in providing assistance and guidance. The efforts to tackle mental health concerns have become a pressing priority, resonating with many individuals nationwide.
news.headline: Bishop Loverde Scholarship Fund launched at Divine Mercy University in Sterling, VA to address rising mental health needs.

news.summary: In Tomball, Texas, Acuren Corporation (NYSE American: TIC), a prominent provider of asset integrity services, shared its financial outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The report includes the impact of acquiring ASP Acuren Holdings, Inc. The period from January 1, 2025, to March 31, 2025, is denoted as the "Successor" period.
news.headline: Acuren Corp (NYSE American: TIC) announces Q1 2025 results post acquisition. January 1 to March 31 referred to as "Successor" period.

news.summary: A new online platform and accompanying book have been launched to empower 3 million sales professionals to navigate chaos, complexity, and upheaval. Amid economic turbulence, changing markets, and increasing global tariffs, conventional sales techniques are proving ineffective. Los Angeles, May 15, 2025 /PRNewswire - This initiative aims to equip sales professionals with the tools and strategies needed to succeed in challenging environments.
news.headline: Spire equips 3 million sales professionals with game-changing training amid economic uncertainty and rising global tariffs.

news.summary: In a recent report, it has been disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decline translates to approximately 200,000 more individuals finding employment opportunities. Additionally, the report highlighted a notable increase in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs added to the economy. These numbers reflect a positive trend in the labor market, showcasing a strong recovery from the economic challenges faced earlier in the year. The data indicates promising growth and stability in the job sector, offering hope for both job seekers and the overall economy.
news.headline: Cabaletta Bio to submit BLA for Rese-cel in Myositis by 2027 after FDA aligns on registrational cohorts.

news.summary: A recent report by QKS Group, a leading market intelligence and advisory firm, indicates a significant growth rate of 21.64% in the Extended Detection and Response (XDR) market. This growth signifies a new phase of expansion in the market. The analysis, released on May 15, 2025, in Middleton, Massachusetts, highlights the increasing demand for XDR solutions. This data suggests a positive trend for the industry, with potential for further advancements and opportunities.
news.headline: Extended Detection and Response (XDR) market projected to grow at a CAGR of 21.64% through 2030, signals rapid expansion.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted by SearchStax and The Chronicle of Higher Education involved more than 225 marketing and digital leaders. The survey aimed to uncover the extent to which institutions are failing to meet the website expectations of modern students. The findings, released in Los Angeles on May 15, 2025, painted a concerning picture of the industry's shortcomings in catering to the digital experiences that are now the norm.
news.headline: Survey of 225+ leaders finds higher education institutions are failing to meet students' website expectations. LOS ANGELES, May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Dublin-based GH Research PLC (Nasdaq: GHRS), a biopharmaceutical company, has revealed that a Pharmaceutical Pipeline Presentation will be included at the American Society of Clinical Psychopharmacology Annual Meeting in Arizona from May 27 – 30. The presentation will focus on clinical data from a Phase 2b trial (GH001-TRD-201) involving GH001, a treatment for treatment-resistant depression (TRD). Professor Michael E. Thase, MD, from the University of Pennsylvania, will lead the presentation on the results of a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial. The event aims to showcase the potential of GH001 in improving the lives of patients suffering from TRD.
news.headline: GH Research PLC's Pharmaceutical Pipeline Presentation accepted at ASCP 2025 Annual Meeting for GH001 in TRD study. Professor Michael E. Thase to present Phase 2b trial data.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, Canada - On May 15, 2025, Oroco Resource Corp. announced three key advancements regarding its Santo Tomás Copper Project situated in northwestern Mexico. The company, trading on TSX-V as OCO and OTC as ORRCF, detailed crucial progress that signifies significant milestones for Oroco and the project.
news.headline: Oroco Resource Corp. announces three key advancements for Santo Tomás Copper Project in Mexico on May 15, 2025.
